subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Give praise unto the Ancient Lord, that thou hast attained unto the most great honour and been delivered from the darksome realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن مالک قدم را که بشرافت کبری فائز شدی و از مقام تیره ظلمانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
